component.name: YapCap
component.summary: COSMIC panel applet for Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor usage

description.p: YapCap is a native COSMIC panel applet that tracks your AI coding quota for Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor — right from the panel, without leaving your desktop.

Add accounts once and YapCap fetches usage directly from provider APIs using credentials stored locally under YapCap-owned directories. No telemetry, no cloud sync, no separate service account required.

Supports multiple accounts per provider with a side-by-side popup view, an Active badge that reflects your current CLI session, configurable panel styles, and full COSMIC theme integration including light, dark, and accent color support.

screenshot.caption: Multi-account popup with Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor side by side

description.p: Flatpak packaging aligned with COSMIC Store conventions (BaseApp, offline Rust build, pinned git-friendly layout). Improved local install flow via just recipes. Version 0.4.0; see the repository changelog and release notes on GitHub for details.
